title: Purposes of communication
summary: 9609 A Level — why organisations communicate internally and externally.
learningObjectives: Explain link to motivation and control.

simpleExplanation.title: Sharing information deliberately
simpleExplanation.summary: Communication instructs, informs, persuades, and coordinates. Without it, strategy and operations break down.

sections.content: **Communication purposes** (7.2.1) opens **7.2**. Link to **change management** when strategy shifts.
